<!--
Note: during the current P0 (production closure) sprint HydraMind is closed
development and not accepting external pull requests. The open contribution
model takes effect at P1 — see CONTRIBUTING.md. Issues are welcome anytime.
-->

**Summary**
What this change does and why.

**Linked issue**
e.g. `#<issue>`.

**Type**
- [ ] fix
- [ ] feature
- [ ] docs
- [ ] refactor

**Checklist**
- [ ] `ruff` and `mypy --strict` clean
- [ ] `pytest` green (including `tests/contract/test_architecture_invariants.py`)
- [ ] No layer-boundary violation (harness isolation, single-writer RuntimeSession)
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated if user-facing
